title: Re-run gap analysis on current codebase
description: Gap analysis prd.json and vision.json are stale (April 7 timestamp). PRD.md has been written with full requirements. Re-run gap analysis against current codebase and PRD.md to produce accurate match scores. Per-backend tests (40+ files), cross-backend tests (4 files), edge case tests (3 files), README with examples, ARCHITECTURE.md (75 lines), SQLite in createBackend(), batchGet/batchSet/scanStream exposed — all exist but gap files still mark them missing.
